contract: UI UX Pro Max design system, design/content/build plan, selected architecture, asset needs, identity decision

history: Amendment 1: re-palette pomegranate red -> olive-green + warm-gold; tighten layout density (green hero band, section bands, 32/48 rhythm); wire generated logo.
Amendment 2: 'more professional + rooted in the food region/culture' — Tatreez Modern (Palestinian carte), synthesized by a 5-direction design panel + a cultural-authenticity/truthfulness guard.
amendment.reason: Amendment 2 — engagement-owner direction to feel more professional and specifically Palestinian/Levantine (not generic Middle Eastern). Applied: editorial Fraunces serif + IBM Plex Sans typography (retiring Fredoka/Nunito); deep-forest #0F2A1E headings; warm parchment #F4EEE0 menu-stock bands (replacing pale-gold); a Palestinian tatreez (najmet Beit Lahm cross-stitch) motif as gold-on-forest hero/footer saw-hems and olive section dividers/ticks; Palestinian-kitchen copy; a printed-carte menu layout. Green+gold identity, green canvas, and kabab-skewer logo KEPT — refinement, not rebrand.
amendment.scope: typography (fonts), designSystem.palette (add forest/parchment/linen/stitch; madder deferred), tatreez motif, eyebrow/footer/hero-hem CSS, home + menu copy, carte menu rows. No change to identityDecision, page families, route count (41), or the omit-never-fabricate truthfulness floor.
amendment.guardGates: Arabic (ahlan wa sahlan + Naskh dish names) ships HIDDEN behind enableArabic=false until owner Ray Aqel verifies script/diacritics; owner menu spellings (foul, mfatakeh, kalaya, kabab/kabob, 'Mediterranean Delight') frozen verbatim; madder/sumac red dropped (flag-palette + contrast); no fabricated tenure/awards/family-story.

artifact.summary: Phase 3 DESIGN artifact for Pita Kabab (run pita-kabab-2026-07-12-b5881b47), amendment 1. UI UX Pro Max design system for a Palestinian Mediterranean counter-service family restaurant, anchored on the Duolingo (primary) x Shopify Polaris (structural) reference style guides via the styleguide-library archetype matrix. Standalone token palette (owner brand assets unconfirmed) RE-PALETTED per owner direction: olive-green #1B6E3E single action accent with 3D chunky CTA buttons (white text 6.3:1), warm-gold #E0A80D accent used only with dark ink (6.9:1) for eyebrows/badges/underlines, green-tinted warm canvas #F7F9F3, full-bleed green hero band, alternating pale-gold section bands, Fredoka/Nunito rounded type pairing, WCAG AA floor, mobile-first with singleton sticky call bar. Layout density tightened (section rhythm 32/48, container padding 20/24, hero band replaces empty cream) to resolve the sparse-whitespace feedback. Architecture: Astro static output from engine restaurant archetype templates, 46 data-driven routes (41 unconditional floor). Brand mark generated via Higgsfield (green ring + gold emblem), owner-confirm/replace pending. Identity sealed as declared fixtures (pitakabab.example / owner@pitakabab.example / G-XXXXXXXXXX, paymentAccepted unknown, JSON-LD omission); Phase 5 gate expected to flag fixtures by design. All CRO contract slots and the 32-slot image plan reserved in the design.

checklist.note: Read packet.inputEvidence.phase2.pageMatrix (46 internal pages), pageMatrixStrategy (Restaurant Page-Family Matrix v1, 6 families), and artifactRecordPath before design work; designed against the approved families and route kinds.

Read imageSlotPlan (32 slots, representational-only constraints, 3 conditional) and requiredCroBlocks (engine cro-contract mirror); design reserves every visual and conversion slot including conditional omission behavior.

Ran vendored search.py --design-system for 'restaurant mediterranean palestinian counter-service family warm casual' (project Pita Kabab) plus typography/landing domain searches and --stack astro guidance; output and documented deviations captured in design-system.md.

Consulted references/styleguide-library.md archetype matrix; row 'Restaurant - casual/family/QSR' selects Duolingo primary with Polaris structural blend; Reference Style Guide section records the choice, fit rationale, rejected alternative (Apple HIG), and concrete borrowed cues.

Design system persisted at the packet's artifactEvidencePaths.designSystem path and referenced in designSystem.designSystemPath; token values mirrored in workbench design-tokens.json as Phase 4 build reference.

Phase 4 Build Notes cover page-matrix families to templates mapping, selected Astro architecture, 32-slot asset handoff, identityDecision/canonical metadata derivation from fixtures, and owner-input dependencies.

No Figma source exists for this run; optional designTokenSource/designTokenExportPath/designTokenHash/figmaSyncStatus fields omitted entirely per contract; figma-handoff.md records status not-configured.

identityDecision recorded as declared fixtures (mode fixture); real web-sourced candidates (pitakababcr.com, info@pitakababcr.com) documented in identity-decision.md with non-adoption rationale and swap path before/at Phase 5.
Payment policy owner-unconfirmed: paymentAccepted recorded as 'unknown' and omitted from JSON-LD; no fabricated payment claims anywhere in the design plan.
Read the resolved ui-ux-pro-max SKILL.md and followed its numbered workflow (analyze -> --design-system -> styleguide library -> domain searches -> stack guidance -> UX floor checklist).
All five required fields filled with contract-compliant evidence; designSystemPath matches packet artifactEvidencePaths.designSystem.
inspect-artifact run against this artifact; weaknesses fixed until clean. complete-phase intentionally NOT run per dispatch stop condition.

designSystem.query: restaurant mediterranean palestinian counter-service family warm casual

referenceStyleGuide.selectionBasis: styleguide-library.md archetype matrix row: Restaurant - casual / family / QSR -> Duolingo | Mailchimp - Polaris
borrowedCues: single committed action color used only for primary CTAs (olive-green #1B6E3E — amendment 1; a culturally-fitting Mediterranean green chosen to match the generated brand mark, distinct from Duolingo's brighter green)
3D chunky pressable CTA button: solid green fill + 4px darker bottom edge #14512E collapsing on press (signature component)
two-role rounded type pairing: Fredoka display + Nunito body (open-font stand-ins for proprietary Feather Bold/DIN Round)
14px control / 18px card radius, pale-gold pill badges for hours and gated offers
Polaris card-on-canvas layout: white cards on green-tinted warm canvas #F7F9F3 with 1px hairline sage borders and whisper shadows
Polaris badge/banner patterns for trust signals and holiday-hours announcements, gold-accented
one celebratory micro-interaction only (CTA spring bounce), quick 100-200ms functional motion elsewhere

palette.paletteRationale: amendment 1 — olive-green + warm-gold reads as authentically Mediterranean/Palestinian (olive, herb, gold of grilled kabab and baklava) and matches the generated Higgsfield mark; gold is accent/surface only, always with dark ink, never white-on-gold and never gold text on white
palette.standalone: owner brand assets/rights unconfirmed; tokens stand alone, generated brand mark used as the harmonization anchor, pitakababcr.com referenced as warm-tone inspiration only

typography.display: Fraunces 400/600 + italic (editorial serif — H1-H3, dish names, italic descriptors; display-only)
typography.mono: IBM Plex Mono 500/600 — tracked uppercase eyebrows only
typography.arabic: IBM Plex Sans Arabic 400/500/600 — DRAFT/GATED, hidden until owner sign-off
typography.amendment2: Retired Fredoka + Nunito for Fraunces + IBM Plex Sans (professional editorial 'printed carte' feel); Google Fonts css2 URL validated 200
typography.deviation: generated Caveat/Quicksand pairing rejected for h1-scale legibility on a conversion site

designSystem.accessibilityFloor: WCAG AA: 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text/UI, visible 2px focus rings, >=44px touch targets, prefers-reduced-motion honored, SVG icons only, semantic form labels
designSystem.generatedPattern: Hero-Centric + Conversion (full-bleed green hero band, CTA above the fold)
designSystem.generatedStyle: Vibrant & Block-based, moderated by Polaris card-on-canvas restraint; alternating pale-gold/white full-bleed section bands group content and cut perceived whitespace

layoutDensity.problem: the text-only red/cream build read as sparse — large empty white stretches between sections, empty cream hero
fixes: full-bleed green hero band (white h1 + subhead + gold underline + primary CTA) anchors the top instead of empty cream
section rhythm tightened to 32px mobile / 48px desktop (was 48/80)
container padding 20px mobile / 24px desktop (was 32/24), content max-width 70rem
alternating pale-gold (#FBF3D6) and white full-bleed section bands behind grouped sections so long pages never show unbroken empty canvas
gold small-caps eyebrows introduce sections, adding hierarchy/density without imagery
card radius 18px, card padding 16-20px for a tighter grid
layoutDensity.note: Density comes from color banding, hero anchoring, and rhythm — not from fabricated content. Imagery slots (Phase 6) will fill remaining space later; nothing here ships a fake photo.

deviationsFromGenerator: canvas #FEF2F2 pink tint replaced with green-tinted warm canvas #F7F9F3 (Mediterranean palette, food rendering)
Caveat script headings replaced with Fredoka rounded display
scroll-snap and animated background patterns dropped (menu-page usability, LCP/CLS)

designContentBuildPlan.approach: One shared component kit (chunky CTA button, pill badge, banner, card, sticky call bar, lead form) reused across all six page families; per-family section orders below; conditional CRO blocks render from data presence and are removed, never placeholder-filled.
siteWideSingletons: sticky mobile call/text bar mounted once in the shared layout: 56px + safe-area inset, single-CTA (Call) default, dual Call/Text variant activates only on owner SMS confirmation; 72px mobile body bottom-padding reserve
header: logo slot + one red pill tel: CTA; footer: NAP (3100 6th St SW, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404) + tel: CTA + gated sms: slot

pageFamilyPlans.sections: hero (single h1 + subhead + primary CTA over home-hero image) -> 3-value-prop strip (site.valueProps, owner copy pending) -> menu-category highlights (cards linking all 7 categories) -> occasions rail (catering-led) -> trust grid (conditional >=6 confirmed facts, omitted cleanly otherwise) -> full-width CTA banner (site.ctaBanner over home-cta-banner-bg with dark scrim, >=4.5:1 text) -> neighborhoods teaser -> FAQ teaser -> lead form (conditional on endpoint) -> NAP block
hero (menu-hub-hero) -> 7 category cards from menu.json with representational thumbs -> dual CTA band -> cross-links to top dish landings; absorbs folded gyro intent in copy

NAP card with confirmed address + hours (owner-confirm dependency) -> map/directions CTA -> lead form (<=6 fields, conditional endpoint) -> parking note (unverified claim omitted until confirmed) -> dual CTA

hero (category slot image) -> item rows from menu.json (name + description; PRICE COLUMN OMITTED until owner confirms - omit-never-fabricate) -> cross-links to dish landings and >=1 occasion -> CTA band; detail-kind CRO blocks

hero (occasion slot image) -> occasion value copy -> offering blocks grounded in real menu sections -> >=4 cross-links (menu categories, catering siblings, contact) -> catering terms block (owner-confirm gated) -> lead form or tel CTA; halal-gated occasions (iftar, halal-catering) ship only after confirmation

answer-first block (query-as-heading + 2-3 sentence direct answer at 18px) -> dish/intent depth sections with slot image -> craft-claim captions gated -> cross-links to parent menu category + related dishes + occasion -> CTA band

GEO/AI-answer pattern: question h1, direct answer above first image, structured depth (comparison table for shawarma-vs-gyro, guide sections for what-is-palestinian-food), FAQPage/AboutPage schema hooks per landingKind; owner-unconfirmed claims omitted from About

city-specific H1 -> >=1 genuine local fact card -> >=2 local-proximity trust lines (never reused HQ address line) -> shared representational delivery image (single image across all 8 towns) -> town-specific FAQ -> labeled address keeping HQ city -> CTA; anti-doorway minima are data-level, folds if facts cannot be captured

croBlockDesignSpecs.heroValueProps: exactly 3 items, icon + short line, slot reserved - build gate fails until owner copy captured
croBlockDesignSpecs.ctaBanner: full-width green (#1B6E3E) band with a gold accent underline and a white (surface) CTA button that reads green; tel: anchor + non-empty headline (owner copy pending); optional background image behind scrim later
croBlockDesignSpecs.trustGrid: 2-col mobile / 3-col desktop white cards; requires >=6 owner-confirmed facts; omitted site-wide otherwise with clean section stacking
croBlockDesignSpecs.leadForm: max 6 fields (name, phone, date, party size, occasion, notes), visible labels, blur validation, error below field with recovery text, posts to site.leadForm.endpoint (not provisioned - conditional)
croBlockDesignSpecs.offerCallout: pill badge component; renders only if site.offers non-empty (sole candidate kids $5.98, owner-confirm pending); empty slot removed per KG7
croBlockDesignSpecs.smsCta: designed as gated variant; omitted until SMS capability confirmed for (319) 440-3709
croBlockDesignSpecs.telCta: on every page via header/footer/sticky bar; number read from business.json pending canonical-phone confirmation

designContentBuildPlan.contentTone: warm, family-forward, appetite-led, sentence-case punchy headlines (Fredoka), honest evidence-based copy only - no fabricated rankings, prices, claims, or local facts

selectedArchitecture.stack: Astro static site (static output, zero client-side framework)

routes.rootLanding: pages/[slug].astro from landings.json (18, reserved slugs avoided)

selectedArchitecture.styling: CSS custom properties in a single tokens.css (values mirrored from workbench design-tokens.json); shared .astro components for chunky CTA button, pill badge, banner, card, sticky call bar, lead form; no per-page restyling
selectedArchitecture.images: astro:assets <Image /> with explicit dimensions (CLS < 0.1), WebP/AVIF, lazy-load below fold
selectedArchitecture.fonts: Fredoka + Nunito, font-display: swap, preload two critical weights only
selectedArchitecture.routeCompleteness: route count is a direct function of data entries (7+10+18+8+3=46) keeping the Phase 4 route-completeness comparison exact; 5 conditional pages drop by removing data entries, floor 41 pages

imageSlotPlan.constraintPolicy: representational only - no real-premises/staff/client-event depiction claims in imagery, captions, or alt text; no unverified claim overlays

sharedSlots.note: ONE shared image across all 8 neighborhood pages - no fabricated per-town storefront photos

imageSlotPlan.artDirection: warm natural light, appetite-forward close-ups, olive-green/gold/terracotta environments harmonizing with #F7F9F3 green-tinted canvas and #1B6E3E + #E0A80D accents; 3:2 or 16:9 hero crops with 4:3 mobile safety; 18px card radius on inset images

brandLogo.source: Higgsfield nano_banana, generated 2026-07-12 via the logo-prompting formula (flat vector emblem, green ring + gold text, olive branch + kabab skewer + pita icon, CEDAR RAPIDS)
brandLogo.candidates: 4 variants in reference-photos/logo-candidates/logo-v1..v4.png; v2 selected (solid green ring + gold text — highest contrast, works at favicon size)
brandLogo.status: generated; owner-confirm or replace pending — a generated brand mark is acceptable to ship (it is not a photo of the real premises); owner may swap for an official mark before launch
brandLogo.gate: header/footer/schema placements on white/canvas, no recoloring; palette was chosen to match this mark so no accent-token conflict remains

ogImage.spec: 1200x630 brand-toned representational hero dish with logotype space

assetNeeds.icons: Lucide SVG set, 1.5px stroke, token-sized (icon-sm 20px / icon-md 24px); no emoji icons
assetNeeds.fonts: Fredoka 500/600 + Nunito 400/600/700 (Google Fonts or Fontsource self-host), font-display: swap
assetNeeds.figma: none - no Figma source for this run; optional design-token handoff fields omitted (see figma-handoff.md)

realCandidatesNotAdopted: domain pitakababcr.com (live owner-branded site; control unconfirmed)
email info@pitakababcr.com (published on live site; ownership unconfirmed)
identityDecision.swapPath: replace fixtures with owner-confirmed values before or at Phase 5; canonical URLs/sitemap/og:url/JSON-LD url derive from fixture domain until swapped
identityDecision.gateExpectation: Phase 5 do-not-ship gate MUST flag these fixtures - that is the gate working as designed
identityDecision.paymentPolicy: owner unconfirmed - recorded unknown; paymentAccepted omitted from JSON-LD; no fabricated payment claims

delegationOverride.reason:
# Phase 3 Amendment 1 — Delegation Override

Run: pita-kabab-2026-07-12-b5881b47
Phase: 3 DESIGN
Actor: Yahya (engagement owner)
Role bypassed: builder (fresh sub-agent dispatch)

## Why a fresh-sub-agent dispatch is bypassed for this amendment

The original Phase 3 design work WAS produced by a fresh dispatched sub-agent
(hash-bound worker report on file). This amendment is a narrow, owner-directed
revision of an already-sealed, already-reviewed design: a palette swap
(red → green/gold), a layout-density tightening, and wiring the now-generated
brand mark. It introduces no new design research — it re-applies the same
Duolingo×Polaris system with different token values under explicit, specific
owner direction given in chat this session.

The orchestrator authored the revision directly with full sealed-input context,
keeping every design decision traceable in `amend-1-reason.md`,
`design-system.md` (inline amendment annotations), and `design-tokens.json`.
WCAG AA contrast was re-verified for every new color pair. No contract field was
weakened; the artifact still satisfies `validateArtifactContract(3, …)`.

Per the build-local-site command contract, `amend-phase` accepts an explicit
`--delegation-override` with an actor in lieu of a worker report. That path is
used here deliberately and audibly, not to skip rigor.
